body: PARKED: [tool_surface_incomplete] Blocked predecessor (Drive A) parked before this drive could claim. Resume via /orb:drive 2026-05-24-workflow-conformance after Drive A's spec has shipped (this drive consumes A's classifier helper).
drive completed: 12/12 ACs APPROVE. undotted_substrate finding family shipped + broader layout-dominance suppression. PR #30 merged squash. Review verdict APPROVE, merge state queued.

force-close memory rationale: session-close-2026-05-19-workflow-conformance-shipped is historical context from the prior workflow-conformance shipping, NotApplicable to this drive's undotted_substrate addition (different scope, different decisions).
